problem_statement: Users need a straightforward way to manage their daily tasks, track progress, and organize their to-do lists efficiently to improve personal productivity.
solution_overview: Develop a basic web-based application that allows users to add new tasks, view existing tasks, mark tasks as complete, and delete tasks. The application will focus on a clean user interface and core functionality for task management.
functional_requirements: Users must be able to add new todo items with a description.
Users must be able to view a list of all current todo items.
Users must be able to mark a todo item as completed.
Users must be able to delete a todo item.
Completed todo items should be visually distinguishable.
non_functional_requirements: The application should be responsive and load quickly.
The user interface should be intuitive and easy to navigate.
The codebase should be maintainable and well-structured, leveraging TypeScript's type safety.
The application should run efficiently in modern web browsers.
Data persistence (e.g., in local storage) for tasks should be considered for future enhancements.
tech_stack_recommendation: Frontend Framework: React (with Create React App or Vite for quick setup)
Styling: CSS/SCSS (or a CSS-in-JS library like Styled Components/Emotion)
